subject: feat(theme): complete Phase 3 component migration + theme toggle
body:
Full migration of all components from NativeWind color system to DaisyUI
semantic tokens. Zero old patterns remain in the codebase.

className migrations (275 instances across 28 files):
- bg-background → bg-base-100, bg-backgroundElevated → bg-base-200
- text-text → text-base-content, text-textSecondary → text-base-content/70
- border-border → border-neutral, border-borderDark → border-neutral/70
- bg-primaryDark → bg-primary-content, bg-primaryLight → bg-primary-content

Inline style migrations (~160 instances across 25 files):
- theme.colors.* → useTheme().colors.* (hook-based, theme-aware)
- Module-level StyleSheet.create uses THEME_HEX.luxury.* directly
- withAlpha() for opacity (glassBorder, textSecondary, etc.)

New features:
- Dark/light theme toggle in Settings modal with visual switch

Cleanup:
- Deleted styles/theme.js bridge (zero imports remain)
- Removed all backward-compat CSS aliases from global.css
- global.css now contains only pure DaisyUI oklch theme definitions

Tags: theme, daisyui, uniwind, migration, settings, cleanup
Complexity: 5
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: major
